confidence_rationale: Clear instructional content with educational overlays, text instructions, and systematic anatomical identification protocol. This is definitively tutorial/educational material rather than a performance assessment.
technique_summary: Educational simulation software demonstrating anatomical identification protocols with visual feedback systems and overlay guidance for laparoscopic training.
